message:
🐛 Fix cluster selector dropdown cut off in Cluster Metrics card (#321)

The cluster filter dropdown was clipped by the card's overflow-auto
container. Use createPortal to render the dropdown in document.body
with fixed positioning, matching the pattern used by CardWrapper's
menu. The dropdown position is calculated from the filter button's
bounding rect and clamped to stay on-screen.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
